---
name: AI Issue Report
about: Report an issue with the Auto AI agent, chat, or model behavior
title: ''
labels: ai
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the AI issue**
A clear and concise description of what the AI did wrong or what went wrong with the model interaction.

**What were you trying to do?**
Describe the task you asked the AI to perform.

**What happened instead?**
Describe the incorrect or unexpected behavior.

**Model & Permission Level**
- Model provider/model used:
- Permission level: [Strict / Non-Strict / Bypass / Takeoff]

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or relevant log output.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- App Version:
- Download type: [e.g. portable zip, installer]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
